description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gray gable roof and white exterior walls, surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped garden. The front features a symmetrical facade with a central entryway, flanked by windows and greenery. The rear of the house opens to a backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, patio area, and several trees and shrubs. The side views reveal a driveway leading to a garage, as well as additional garden space and outdoor seating. The windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows, and the roof includes multiple dormers for added light and space. The property is well-maintained, with paved walkways, manicured lawns, and decorative plants enhancing its curb appeal.
description: A two-story white suburban house with a gray gable roof, symmetrical windows, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, front garden, and boundary wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, side garden, and part of the backyard pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and lush landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional garden space, trees, and the side of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, decorative columns, and flanking shrubs
